memoryArtifacts.headline: Jean II de Montmorency
memoryArtifacts.description:
Jean II de Montmorency (° 1404 - 6 juillet 1477, inhumé à Senlis), grand chambellan de France. Fils aîné de Jacques de Montmorency et de Philippe de Melun, fille de Hugues de Melun.

memoryArtifacts.headline: Jean II de Montmorency
memoryArtifacts.description:
Jean II de Montmorency
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Jean II de Montmorency (c. 1404 – 6 July 1477, buried at Senlis), held the office of Grand Chamberlain of France. He was the eldest son of …

Jean II de Montmorency (° 1404 - 6 juillet 1477, inhumé à Senlis), grand chambellan de France. Fils aîné de Jacques de Montmorency et de Philippe de Melun, fille de Hugues de Melun.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean II de Montmorency於大約1401年出生在法國瑟-吉瓦蒙特莫倫希蒙特莫倫希時，他的父親Jacques de Montmorency32歲，母親Philippa de Melun32歲。他於1455年之前與Marguerite d'Orgemont在法國結婚。他們至少是13個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1477年6月26日在法國皮卡迪奧易維波利享年77歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪奧易澤利斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean II de Montmorency于大约1401年出生在法国瑟-吉瓦蒙特莫倫希蒙特莫倫希时，他的父亲Jacques de Montmorency32岁，母亲Philippa de Melun32岁。他于1455年之前与Marguerite d'Orgemont在法国结婚。他们至少是13个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1477年6月26日在法国皮卡迪奧易維波利享年77岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪奧易澤利斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Jean II de Montmorency was born about 1401, in Montmorency, Montmorency, Seine-et-Oise, France, his father, Jacques de Montmorency, was 32 and his mother, Philippa de Melun, was 32. He married Marguerite d'Orgemont before 1455, in France. They were the parents of at least 13 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 26 June 1477, in Verberie, Oise, Picardie, France, at the age of 77, and was buried in Senlis, Oise, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean II de Montmorency est né environ 1401, à Montmorency, Montmorency, Seine-et-Oise, France, son père, Jacques de Montmorency, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Philippa de Melun, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite d'Orgemont avant 1455, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 13 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 26 juin 1477, à Verberie, Oise, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Senlis, Oise, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean II de Montmorency um 1401 in Montmorency, Montmorency, Seine-et-Oise, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jacques de Montmorency 32 und seine Mutter Philippa de Melun 32. Er hat vor 1455 in Frankreich Marguerite d'Orgemont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 13 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Juni 1477 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Verberie, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Senlis, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean II de Montmorency è nato il circa 1401 nel Montmorency, Montmorency, Seine-et-Oise, Francia, il suo padre, Jacques de Montmorency, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Philippa de Melun, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite d'Orgemont prima del 1455, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 13 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 giugno 1477, nel Verberie, Oise, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Senlis, Oise, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean II de Montmorencyが約1401年にフランスセアイネ-エト-オイゼモントモーエンシモントモーエンシで生まれた時，父Jacques de Montmorencyは32歳，母Philippa de Melunは32歳であった。1455年以前にフランスでMarguerite d'Orgemontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも13人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1477年6月26日にフランスピカーディオイゼバーバーイで77歳で死去し，フランスピカーディオイゼセンリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean II de Montmorency(이)가 대략 1401년 프랑스 세이인-트-이스 몽모렌시 몽모렌시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jacques de Montmorency(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa de Melun(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1455년 이전 프랑스에서 Marguerite d'Orgemont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1477년 6월 26일 프랑스 피카디 이스 베르베리에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 이스 센리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean II de Montmorency nasceu aproximadamente 1401, em Montmorency, Montmorency, Seine-et-Oise, França, seu pai, Jacques de Montmorency, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Philippa de Melun, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite d'Orgemont antes 1455, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 13 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de junho de 1477, em Verberie, Oise, Picardie, França, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Senlis, Oise, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean II de Montmorency родился около 1401 г. в местности монтморенси, монтморенси, сине-ет-оис, Франция, его отцу по имени Jacques de Montmorency было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa de Melun, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite d'Orgemont перед 1455 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 13 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 26 июня 1477 г. в местности вирбири, оис, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности сенлис, оис, пикарди, Франция.
